3293290.name: Rage Platformer
3293290.description:
Rage Platformer (known as KeNi Adventure) is a fast-paced, precision platformer that delivers a relentless challenge for even the most skilled players. Prepare to embark on a journey filled with deviously designed levels, each packed with complex puzzles and brutal obstacles that demand mastery of timing, agility, and wit.

In this unforgiving platformer, your patience will be tested as much as your reflexes. Each level brings a unique twist, requiring quick thinking and precise movements to navigate deadly traps and reach the goal. Mistakes are part of the process—learn from them, adapt, and overcome.
3293290.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
